title: THC's Fast Armor
description: Adds a flatter texture to Gold, Diamond, Iron, Leather, Copper, and Netherite armor to increase performance.
body:
![Thunderchuck's Fast Armor](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e327ce99bf83ded133e3a0d8374a5876994a7fa2.png)

Adds a less complicated texture to Gold, Diamond, Iron, Leather, Copper, and Netherite armor for the poorpuse of increasing performance.
